items.prompt: The public comment pragma is for…
choices: Exposing selected internal signals to the C++ host
Already part of the boundary—no public pragma needed for normal access
Only visible in the browser lab
Hidden from the host unless you over-expose with pragmas
Always visible to any C++ code automatically

items.prompt: Marking every internal net public is discouraged—it couples testbench to implementation and can slow builds.
items.explain: Minimal exposure is the engineering habit.
